result.finding: Default Spring Boot Logback logging with Spring Boot Actuator for metrics/health telemetry. No AOP, no third-party APM agent (Application Insights, New Relic, Datadog, etc.) configured.
evidence: No logback.xml, logback-spring.xml, log4j2.xml found — uses Spring Boot's default Logback configuration
No @Aspect, @Before, @After, or @Around annotations found in any Java source file (no AOP)
No applicationinsights, opentelemetry, newrelic, dd-trace, or elastic-apm dependencies in pom.xml
PetClinicApplication.java is the sole entry point (@SpringBootApplication), no custom startup telemetry initialization
